differential_diagnoses: Common Variable Immunodeficiency (CVID) with associated enteropathy
Enteropathy-associated T-cell lymphoma (EATL) or NK-cell lymphoma
Small bowel adenocarcinoma arising in the setting of chronic inflammation
next_steps: Surgical consultation for possible exploratory laparotomy given the suspicion of bowel ischemia/aneurysmal dilatation
Deep-tissue biopsy of the aneurysmal jejunal segments for histopathology and immunohistochemistry (including markers for lymphoma and vasculitis)
Bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with flow cytometry to further characterize the clonal NK-cell population
Genetic testing for primary immunodeficiency syndromes (e.g., CTLA-4, LRBA)
Vascular imaging (CT angiography or digital subtraction angiography) to rule out mesenteric vasculitis
Interdisciplinary review including hematology/oncology, infectious disease, and gastroenterology
